hero.herodesc: Professional healthcare assistant for medicine scanning, report analysis, and health tracking. Designed for clarity and ease of use for all ages.

features.title: Intelligent Features
features.heading: Advanced Care for Everyone, Simplified.
features.subheading: Empowering you with AI-driven tools to manage your health safely and effectively, without the medical jargon.

scan.title: Medicine Scanner
scan.desc: Instantly identify pills, check dosages, and see potential side effects using ScanSense AI.

report.title: Report Analysis
report.desc: Upload complex medical reports and get simplified, easy-to-read summaries in seconds.

chatbot.title: Health Dashboard
chatbot.desc: Track your vitals, medication history, and appointments in one clean, large-font interface.

history.title: Fake Drug Detection
history.desc: Verify the authenticity of your medication with our global database and security checks.

testimonial.title: What our users are saying
testimonial.subheading: Join thousands of people who trust MediCare for their daily health management.

feedback1.name: Robert Chen
feedback1.comment: As an elderly person, I used to struggle with all the different pills. The scanner is a life-saver, literally! Everything is so clear and easy to read.

feedback2.name: Sarah Miller
feedback2.comment: The report analysis tool helped me understand my lab results before I even talked to my doctor. It made me feel much more in control of my health.

package.subheading: Start your 14-day free trial today. No credit card required. Experience the future of personalized AI healthcare.
